event: severely injured in a car accident
left leg stabilized with external fixation
external fixation substituted by femur nail
admitted to a teaching hospital in southeast Germany (Bavaria)
decreased serum concentration of total protein
pus secreted from a fistula of left hip joint
Gram negative bacteria with ESBL isolated
admitted to pediatric surgery ward after 2 weeks
approximately 60 dressing changes with general anesthetics
MRSA frequently isolated in first 3 weeks after admission
MRSA not found in swabs from September 16, 2013 to March 20, 2014
MRSA detected in nose swab on March 20, 2014
MRSA found in biopsy sample on May 16, 2014
MRSA detected in swabs from nose and throat after May 16, 2014
amputation of lower legs (knee disarticulation) on June 3, 2014
MRSA detected in biopsy of infected limb on June 3, 2014
admitted to intensive care unit post-surgery
revision surgery of right thigh wound on June 18, 2014
no further MRSA found in swabs
C-reactive protein and WBC remained increased
